vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: This finding involves setting standard file permissions on a backup copy of /etc/passwd. The remediation is a simple chmod operation that does not affect authentication, authorization, networking, or filesystems. It follows standard STIG hardening patterns for file permissions and poses minimal risk of system breakage or lockout.
